issues.comment: The contents of category_fabricator.rb and embeddable_host_fabricator.rb have been swapped. category_fabricator.rb now defines Fabricator(:embeddable_host) and embeddable_host_fabricator.rb defines the category fabricators. While Fabrication loads by symbol name so tests won't immediately break, the files contain the wrong fabricators, causing maintenance confusion.

When the 'embed_category' site setting doesn't exist (e.g., fresh installs), the SQL query returns zero rows. Accessing [0] on an empty PG::Result returns nil, and then nil['id'] raises NoMethodError. The fallback check (if category_id == 0) is never reached. Should guard against empty results, e.g., check cmd_tuples > 0 before accessing [0]['id'].

In the plural ID branch of _hydrateEmbedded, _lookupSubType returns undefined when it can't find a record, and .map() preserves these undefined values in the resulting array. The `hydrated || []` fallback is dead code since .map() always returns an array (even an empty one is truthy), so arrays of undefined values are stored. Additionally, `delete obj[k]` unconditionally removes the original _ids key even when no lookups succeeded, permanently losing the raw IDs.
